g.text: Step through the doorway that shows no r...
Shoulder through the nearest bright door...
Wait for the true door to reveal itself.
Feel along the frames for a hidden latch...
Follow your own reflection deeper in.
Gamble on the door you first came in by.
Tread the dull steps the candle does not...
Take the bright steps, they look nearest...
Slide down the banister to save time.
Hold at the top until your eyes adjust.
Jump the flight to the lit candle below.
Gamble and pinch the candle out to read ...
Move only under the orchestra's loud swe...
Cross in the quiet to hear yourself thin...
Call out to test for an echo.
Wait for the music to stop, then run.
Drag your hand along the wall to steady ...
Hum along to match the swell.
Gamble and sprint the whole gallery at o...
Cross while the chandelier hangs dead st...
Dash under it while it's still climbing.
Cut the chain to drop it out of the way.
Hold at the edge until it stops on its o...
Climb the chain above the swing.
Gamble on the mirror floor holding your ...
Fog it once, read the seam, and step thr...
Warm the whole glass with both hands.
Breathe on it slow to be sure of the sea...
Strike the frozen glass to break through...
Wipe the frost clear with your sleeve.
Gamble and step through where you guess ...
Pass the warden that casts no shadow.
Pass the one with a shadow at its feet.
Strike the glass one to be certain.
Wait to see which of them breathes.
Walk the line straight between them.
Gamble and offer your hand to the nearer...
Edge along the narrow stone rim.
Cross the bright floor in the middle.
Swim straight across, it's only water.
Wait on the rim for the water to still.
Reach for the reflected rail to steady y...
Gamble and leap the pit at its narrow th...
Take the unlit turns through the maze.
Follow the lighted turns, they seem the ...
Pinch out a candle to darken a false tur...
Stop and wait for a candle to burn out.
Knock a wall to hear which are hollow.
Gamble and follow the draft instead of t...
Drop through on the downbeat of the musi...
Pry the lid up during a quiet rest.
Wait for a longer, safer gap in the musi...
Wedge the lid so it can't close on you.
Drop through on the last note, not the f...
Gamble and roll through without counting...
Go to the mask that never blinks.
Push into a mask that blinks back at you...
Lift a mask off the wall to check behind...
Wait for the masks to stop blinking.
Cover your eyes and feel for the gap.
Break the stillest mask to open it wider...
Gamble and count the blinks for the odd ...
Cross fast on the tiles the sand hasn't ...
Wade across the buried tiles anyway.
Wait for the sand to finish draining.
Sweep the sand aside to read the tiles.
Leap tile to tile down the middle.
Gamble and run the buried floor flat out...
Walk the welded seam down the centre.
Walk the open span, it looks solid enoug...
Crawl across to spread your weight.
Wait for the glass to frost over for gri...
Slide across on your back, faster.
Gamble and walk it upright without mindi...
Keep straight and answer none of the voi...
Turn to the voice that has your name.
Answer, to prove it isn't you.
Stop and wait for the voices to tire.
Follow the one voice that sounds kind.
Gamble and follow the one voice that doe...
Cross under the whole panes, the floor's...
Sweep a path clear through the shards.
Wait for the loose panes to fall first.
Run through fast before anything can fal...
Gamble and go barefoot over the shards f...
Follow the one dry vein down the wall.
Push through the wet glass, it's only wa...
Wipe the wall dry ahead of you.
Wait for the wall to stop weeping.
Cross to a dry patch on the far side.
Gamble and go through the thinnest run o...
Step through when the doorway lines up.
Step in against the closed wall to wait ...
Force the drum to stop turning.
Wait for the drum to slow down.
Dive through as the door is already leav...
Gamble and match the drum's spin from in...
Wait for the lamp to gutter, then move i...
Step for the door while the lamp still b...
Reach through the mirror to shove it asi...
Wait for the reflection to look away fir...
Feint one way and go the other.
Gamble and rush the mirror before you lo...
Walk toward the gap where your reflectio...
Walk toward the thickest crowd of yourse...
Wait for the reflections to settle and a...
Break the nearest you to open a way.
Follow the you that beckons you on.
Gamble and shut your eyes and walk a str...
Smash the last mirror to be certain of i...
Wait for the house lights to prove the w...
Trust your own reflection to lead you up...
Follow it toward the dark door you had a...
